title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Courses from Pakistan Without Stripe — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a creator in Pakistan, you know the struggle: Stripe and PayPal are off-limits, leaving you stranded without a way to sell your courses or digital products. Gumroad and Payhip? Also blocked. This isn’t just about inconvenience—it’s about being locked out of global markets. But here’s the reality: crypto-native infrastructure isn’t just a workaround; it’s a permanent solution. This post breaks down your real options, comparing traditional platforms (that exclude you) against crypto-based systems (that don’t). No fluff, no corporate jargon—just a clear side-by-side analysis of what works, what doesn’t, and why.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Traditional platforms like Stripe, PayPal, Gumroad, and Payhip promise simplicity: payment processing, digital delivery, and sometimes even storefronts. But for creators in Pakistan, these promises are empty. Stripe and PayPal require banking systems they don’t support, while Gumroad and Payhip lean on these same processors. Crypto-native infrastructure, on the other hand, cuts out the middleman entirely. With tools like Unchained Commerce’s Core Shop Engine, you get automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts—all without needing a payment processor account. The Web3 Wallet Connect adds frontend integration for 300+ cryptocurrencies, and the Admin Dashboard gives you transaction logs and real-time analytics. It’s a full stack built for creators who need global access, not geographic permissions.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Traditional platforms exclude countries based on banking regulations, sanctions, or risk assessments—Pakistan, Nigeria, Ghana, and others are routinely blocked. Even if you use a VPN or intermediary, these platforms flag and suspend accounts. Crypto-native systems operate on a different logic: they’re decentralized. Unchained Commerce’s infrastructure works anywhere because it doesn’t rely on centralized banks or processors. It uses NOWPayments for crypto transactions, which supports 300+ coins and requires no KYC. This isn’t a workaround—it’s a structural alternative. While Stripe and PayPal build walls, crypto-native tools build bridges. The tradeoff? You’re dealing in crypto, not fiat. But for creators in restricted countries, that’s a tradeoff worth making.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Stripe and PayPal offer instant payments but charge 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction—and that’s before currency conversion fees or potential account holds. Gumroad and Payhip add their own cuts on top of these processors. Crypto payments via NOWPayments charge 0.5% per transaction, with no hidden fees. The catch? Crypto volatility. But with live price feeds and multi-chain QR codes, you can invoice in stablecoins like USDT or accept 300+ coins. Unchained Commerce’s Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) includes everything you need to manage this—automated delivery, real-time analytics, and priority updates. It’s a one-time payment for lifetime access, versus the recurring fees of traditional platforms. For creators in Pakistan, the cost-benefit is clear: lower fees, global reach, and no subscriptions.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Traditional platforms automate delivery—but only if you’re allowed to use them. For creators in Pakistan, this automation is theoretical. Crypto-native systems like Unchained Commerce’s Core Shop Engine automate delivery instantly upon payment verification, no matter where you’re located. The Admin Dashboard lets you manage orders and track transactions in real time. Traditional platforms also require you to integrate with their ecosystems, which can be clunky. With Unchained Commerce, you own the infrastructure. It’s deployed on your server, giving you full control. The tradeoff? You need to handle deployment. But the Full Stack Bundle includes a deployment guide and Discord support, making it accessible even if you’re not a developer.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you’re in Pakistan and need to sell courses or digital products, traditional platforms are a dead end. Stripe, PayPal, Gumroad, and Payhip aren’t options—they’re obstacles. Crypto-native infrastructure is the only structural alternative that gives you global access without geographic restrictions. If you’re comfortable with crypto (or willing to learn), Unchained Commerce’s Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) provides everything you need: automated delivery, multi-chain payments, and real-time analytics. It’s a one-time payment for lifetime access, with no subscriptions or hidden fees. For creators in restricted countries, this isn’t just a choice—it’s the only choice that works.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The best PayPal alternative for creators in restricted countries is crypto-native infrastructure. Unlike PayPal, which blocks entire countries due to banking regulations, crypto-based systems operate globally without geographic restrictions. Unchained Commerce’s Core Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect allow you to accept payments in 300+ cryptocurrencies, with no KYC requirements. This isn’t a temporary fix—it’s a permanent solution that gives you control over your sales, regardless of where you’re located.
Crypto-native infrastructure means no single platform decision can cut off your income.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

Creators researching PayPal alternatives often discover that the real problem is not finding a single substitute — it is rebuilding the entire payment and delivery stack on infrastructure that does not inherit conventional payment system restrictions. The Core Shop Engine at $49.99 handles the backend piece: payment verification, automated delivery, and receipt generation. Web3 Wallet Connect at $19.99 handles the buyer-facing checkout. Together, they replace what Gumroad or Payhip was doing, but without any platform that can restrict your access. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes both components plus the Admin Dashboard and deployment guide. Visit the shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to see the complete component breakdown.
Your Action Checklist

Start by accepting that no PayPal or Stripe workaround is durable — the platforms actively close gaps as they discover them. Create a NOWPayments account and configure wallet addresses for USDT on Tron and Bitcoin as your primary coins. Purchase and deploy the Core Shop Engine — it handles payment verification and automated delivery. Configure the Web3 Wallet Connect module with your product details and checkout settings. Upload your digital product files to your delivery server with the paths configured in the engine. Test the complete flow with a real mainnet transaction — send a small amount to your wallet and confirm the webhook fires and the delivery email arrives. Check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log. Add your store URL to your social profiles and content channels. You now have infrastructure that no payment platform can take from you.
The store that runs on a wallet and a webhook cannot be suspended by anyone else's compliance team.
Full Stack Bundle — $79.99. Everything — Core Engine, Wallet Connect, Dashboard — plus priority updates, Discord support, and deployment guide. Your complete store infrastructure, one payment.
